models.name: qwen2.5-14b-instruct
models.notes: Official Qwen 14B instruction-tuned model. Use this safetensors checkpoint for LoRA/QLoRA fine-tuning, not the GGUF file.

models.name: deepseek-r1-distill-qwen-14b
models.notes: DeepSeek R1 distilled 14B model based on Qwen2.5. Use this safetensors checkpoint for LoRA/QLoRA fine-tuning, not the GGUF file.
